name: Wake Up!
storyIntro: The Catbus needs to follow a morning routine! But it forgot the steps!
storyOutro: The morning routine is back on track! Time to start the day!

tasks.prompt: What is the first thing you do in the morning?
tasks.hint: You open your eyes and get out of bed.

tasks.prompt: After you wake up, you ___ and take a shower.
tasks.hint: You stand up and leave your bed.

tasks.prompt: Match each routine to when you do it.
tasks.hint: Think about what time of day you do each thing.

tasks.prompt: Put the morning routine in order.
tasks.hint: What do you do first when you wake up?
You use a toothbrush and toothpaste.

tasks.prompt: After school, you ___ before you can play.
tasks.hint: You need to finish your school work first!

tasks.prompt: The first meal of the day. You eat it in the morning.
tasks.hint: Break + fast = the meal that breaks your overnight fast!

tasks.prompt: Match the activity to what you need.
tasks.hint: What do you need for each activity?

tasks.prompt: Put the evening routine in order.
tasks.hint: First you eat, then you clean up.

tasks.prompt: Before school, I ___, ___, and ___ every day.
options: wake up, get dressed, have breakfast
go to bed, have dinner, sleep
take a nap, eat lunch, rest
tasks.hint: Morning activities before going to school!
